title: GBPUAT Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Young Professional I Posts
description: The G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Young Professional I Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree can apply for the GBPUAT Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection pro...
